entries.definition:
m–ʿ–y intestine; soft ripening date, soft food; (of troubles or
disturbance) to spread out. Of this root, أَمْعَاء ʾamʿāʾ occurs once
in the Qur’an.

أَمْعَاء ʾamʿāʾ [pl. of n. مِعًى miʿā, مَعًى maʿā, or مِعَاء miʿāʾ]
intestines, bowels (47:15) وَسُقُوا مَاءً حَمِيمًا فَقَطَّعَ أَمْعَاءَهُمْ and they are
made to drink boiling water, [which] shreds their bowels.
